_metadata.description: Comprehensive conditional logic scenarios extracted from boilerplate analysis for template rendering

scenarios.description: Content varies based on value scenario type (As Stabilized, As If Renovated & Stabilized, As Is)

content_variants.As Stabilized: The use of a hypothetical condition(s) may have impacted the results of the assignment. The As Stabilized value has been developed based on the hypothetical condition that the subject property is fully leased at prevailing market rents and has achieved stabilized occupancy as of the effective date of the appraisal. Under this premise, no deductions are made for holding costs, rent loss, or lease-up expenses. In addition it is a hypothetical condition that all units could achieve current market rent levels and stabilized occupancy as of the effective date. In reality, as of the effective date, the property's existing lease terms reflect contract rents that are deemed to be below-market rents. For the purposes of this analysis, it is assumed that lease-up to market rent levels has occurred under typical market conditions, without undue delay or concessions exceeding market norms. If this assumption proves incorrect, such as market rents are not achievable the value conclusion may be materially impacted.
content_variants.As If Renovated & Stabilized: The use of a hypothetical condition(s) may have impacted the results of the assignment. The As If Renovated & Stabilized market value concluded herein has been developed under the hypothetical condition that the existing improvements, as described in this report, have been fully renovated and have been leased at market rents with stabilized occupancy as of the effective date. In reality, the renovations are not complete as of the effective date. This appraisal does not consider unforeseeable events that could affect the timing, cost, or outcome of the renovation and lease-up process. If the stated hypothetical condition does not hold true, the value conclusion presented herein may be materially affected.
content_variants.As Is: No Hypothetical Conditions were made for this assignment.

content_variants.As Stabilized: No Extraordinary Assumptions were made for this assignment.
content_variants.As If Renovated & Stabilized: The use of an extraordinary assumption(s) may have impacted the results of the assignment. The As If Renovated & Stabilized market value concluded herein has been developed under the extraordinary assumption that the existing improvements, as described in this report, have been fully renovated and have been leased at market rents with stabilized occupancy as of the effective date. In reality, the renovations are not complete as of the effective date. This appraisal does not consider unforeseeable events that could affect the timing, cost, or outcome of the renovation and lease-up process. If the stated hypothetical condition does not hold true, the value conclusion presented herein may be materially affected.
content_variants.As Is: No Extraordinary Assumptions were made for this assignment.

content_variants.As Stabilized: which at the time of inspection represents the improved property as of the effective date and leased up at market rental rates and operating costs
content_variants.As If Renovated & Stabilized: which at the time of inspection represents the improved property as of the effective date following completion of renovations and stabilized lease-up
content_variants.As Is: which at the time of inspection represents the improved property as of the effective date

scenarios.description: Singular vs plural language based on number of buildings

logic.else: Multiple site plans (one per lot/parcel or building)

scenarios.description: Toggle between inspector assistance text and no assistance text

logic.then: {{inspector-name}} of {{inspector-company}}, a member of {{inspector-organization}} provided real property appraisal assistance to the appraisers signing this certification. Assistance provided includes property inspection. {{inspector-name}} is registered as a non-member with the AIC to provide professional assistance with real property inspection.
logic.else: No one provided real property appraisal assistance to the appraiser signing this certification. Assistance provided includes miscellaneous administrative assistance, such as file and exhibit preparation, as well as data entry relating to area descriptions and other routine front-half related duties.

scenarios.description: Optionally include demographics paragraph in Location section
Include pending sale details or default 'unaware of sales' text

logic.then: As noted, the subject property is currently under contract by our client at a sale price of {{pending-sale-price}}. Offer was signed {{pending-offer-date}} with final waiver on {{pending-waiver-date}} and closing {{pending-closing-date}}.
logic.else: We are unaware of any pending sales or listing activity relating to the subject property.

scenarios.description: Include weighted year built if property has multiple buildings of different ages
Include client title in transmittal letter if provided
Include Proposed Capital Expenditures section for renovation scenarios

logic.then: Include 'Proposed Capital Expenditures' section with renovation budget breakdown

conditionals.then: use inspector assistance text with name/company

conditionals.else: use 'We are unaware of any pending sales...' text

boilerplate_defaults.default: No Extraordinary Limiting Conditions were made for this assignment.
boilerplate_defaults.notes: This text is 100% boilerplate and appears identical in all reports analyzed
Standard for multi-family properties, but can be overridden
Most common authorized use, but can be overridden

boilerplate_defaults.default: No zoning change is believed to be imminent.
boilerplate_defaults.notes: Standard default, but can be overridden with 'A zoning change for the subject does not appear likely.'

execution_order: 1. Load all field values from reportBuilderStore
2. Apply defaults for any missing optional fields
10. Render all sections with applied conditionals
validation_rules: If value-scenario-type == 'As If Renovated & Stabilized', then capex-budget-total MUST exist
If inspector-provided == true, then inspector-name, inspector-company, inspector-organization MUST exist
If pending-sale == true, then pending-sale-price, pending-offer-date, pending-waiver-date, pending-closing-date MUST exist
If include-demographics == true, then demographics-text MUST exist

critical_conditionals: value-scenario-type is THE most critical conditional - affects multiple sections including hypothetical conditions, extraordinary assumptions, and H&B Use scenario
building-count affects narrative language throughout the report (singular vs plural)
implementation_strategy: Use template literal functions for conditional rendering
Create helper function for value-scenario-type that returns object with all related content
Implement field validation before rendering to ensure required conditional fields exist
Provide clear error messages if required conditional fields are missing
